get_merge_request.title: Add CSV export to the reports dashboard
get_merge_request.description:
## What & why

Adds a "Download CSV" button to the reports dashboard so analysts can export the
current filtered view. Resolves the long-standing request to get data out of the UI
without a DBA.

Jira: https://acme.atlassian.net/browse/RPT-318

## How to test

1. `npm install && npm run dev`
2. Open `/reports`, apply any date filter.
3. Click **Download CSV** and confirm the file matches the on-screen rows.
4. Run `npm test -- reports-export` to exercise the unit tests.

## Proof it was run

Screenshot of the exported file opened in a spreadsheet, plus the passing test log:

```
PASS  src/reports/export.test.ts (12 tests)
  ✓ serializes filtered rows to CSV
  ✓ escapes commas and quotes
Test Suites: 1 passed, Tests: 12 passed
```

![exported csv screenshot](https://acme.gitlab.io/uploads/csv-export.png)

## Notes for reviewer

Start in `src/reports/export.ts` (core logic); the component wiring in
`ReportsToolbar.tsx` is thin. No breaking changes, no migrations.
get_merge_request.commit_summary: 3 commits: add CSV serializer, wire toolbar button, add tests

notes.body: Thanks for the clear testing steps and the screenshot — easy to pick up.
